name: Naoroj Jaman Rafi
program: Bachelor in Computer Science and Technology
quote: EduExpress International was pivotal in helping me obtain a Full Tuition Fee Scholarship and a 1200CNY monthly stipend for my Computer Science and Technology major at Shanghai University of Electric Power. Their thorough assistance, from application and scholarship processing to visa support and airport pickup in China, ensured a seamless transition from Bangladesh to my new academic environment. l am incredibly thankful for their support and the significant financial relief it has provided.

name: MD Khaled Mahmud
quote: With the guidance of EduExpress International, I was able to secure a Full Tuition Fee Scholarship along with a monthly stipend of 1000 CNY for my studies in Computer Science and Technology at Taiyuan University of Technology. Their comprehensive services, including application and scholarship processing, visa assistance, and on-ground support in China, have been invaluable. I'm profoundly grateful for the opportunity and the financial support that has made my education journey smooth and worry-free.

name: Lija Akter
quote: With the invaluable assistance of EduExpress International, I was awarded a full scholarship for my Bachelor's in Pharmacy at Nantong University. From the detailed application process in Bangladesh through to scholarship processing, visa arrangements, and their thorough pre-departure services, their expertise and support were evident. Their dedication to ensuring a smooth transition, including airport pickup and registration assistance, truly set me on the path to success. I'm deeply thankful for their unwavering support in navigating this life-changing journey.

name: Tharushi Chathurika David Arachchilage
program: Bachelor in Computer Science and Technology
quote: EduExpress International was instrumental in helping me achieve a Full Tuition Fee Scholarship for my Computer Science and Technology major at Southwest Petroleum University. Their guidance through the application and scholarship processing was invaluable, turning my dream of studying abroad into a reality. I'm immensely thankful for their support from Sri Lanka to my new academic home.

name: Md. Sakib Hasan
quote: Thanks to EduExpress International, I secured a tuition-free scholarship at Shanghai University of Engineering Science for my Bachelor's in Artificial Intelligence. Their expertise in application processing, visa handling, and personalized services like airport pickup made my dream of studying abroad a reality. Highly recommend their outstanding consultancy service to any aspiring student.

name: Orarigdech Yannapong
quote: With the expert assistance of EduExpress International, I was awarded a full scholarship covering both tuition and hostel fees for my diploma in Computer Network Technology at Jiangsu Shipping College. Their guidance through the application and scholarship processing was seamless, making the entire journey from Thailand smooth and stress-free. I am incredibly thankful for their support and the opportunity to pursue my studies without financial burden.

name: Birinda Nemezo Ella Franck Levy
program: Bachelor in Computer Science and Technology
quote: EduExpress International made my educational dream a reality by securing a full scholarship for my Bachelor's in Computer Science and Technology at Shaoxing University, covering tuition, hostel fees, and a 500 CNY monthly stipend. Their expertise in navigating the application and scholarship process from Gabon to China has been instrumental in my journey. I'm deeply thankful for their support and the opportunity to advance my education.
